Home

Radical Queer Playhouse is a DIY, kink space for queer and WLINTA* folx who are not cis-hetero men.

Every third Saturday of the month between 16:30 and 21:00 in Amsterdam. Check radar.squat.net for our active events

If you would like to sign-up for an event, collaborate or contribute, please contact us by e-mail bigfatpervs@riseup.net
